summary: Back at a World Cup after a long wait — a direct, set-piece-deadly 4-4-2 / 4-2-3-1 / 4-2-2-2 mash-up that drops into a mid-to-low block.
style: 4-4-2 / 4-2-3-1 / 4-2-2-2 mash-up — direct play for territory, wide & cross, attack the box in numbers; drop into a mid-to-low block.

counterReliance.note: Direct for territory, deep block, set-piece focus

strengths: Direct play for territory and crossing in numbers
weaknesses: Could struggle if they can't get the defensive block right

keyPlayers.name: Ali Jasim
keyPlayers.note: Creative dribbler & crosser, technically proficient — a young, exciting prospect

tactics: Go direct for territory, get wide and cross, attack the box in numbers and play for set-pieces, all behind a deep block. The defensive structure will decide their tournament.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
